text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Swan S. has arrived. I step inside
the waiting room, only to find Hishi Akebono
crouched down on all fours.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hang back for a moment. Her movements are
fluid as she rinses out her mouth and scatters salt
on the floor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, she stands on her tiptoes, widens her
stance, and crouches. Then, she stands tall,
crouches again, and thrusts her arms before her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Phew! All right! I'm gonna do my best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm, well... I was copying a ritual!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Have you seen it done before? Sumo wrestlers
carry out the same ritual before matches.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Purifying their bodies and the wrestling ring is like
their way of saying that they'll have a good, clean
match.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but my jitters are way worse
than usual today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I just can't sit still knowing the race is about to
start, so I did the ritual to help calm my nerves.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And guess what? I feel ready to go now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the ritual gave me some sumo powers, but
I feel like I can do some really incredible pivot
throws today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen Hishi Akebono this ready to race
as the curtain rises on the Swan S!
